subject: Sprint 3 start — claiming remaining tasks
body:
Starting sprint 3. Claiming:

1. Cloud shadow projection onto globe
2. Temporal accumulation (TAA) for clouds
3. Better visual polish (contrast, colors, atmosphere)
4. Server improvements (WebSocket for real-time updates)
5. Performance optimizations

NOT touching: your recent changes, cloud shaders, atmosphere, skybox.

Let's finish this strong. 🚀
